heading: Use of money collected from States for fire suppression assistance
label: 2106b Use of money collected from States for fire suppression assistance
text: Any money collected from the States for fire suppression assistance rendered by the Forest Service on non-Federal lands not in the vicinity of National Forest System lands shall on and after , be used to reimburse the applicable appropriation and shall remain available until expended as the Secretary may direct in conducting activities authorized by note, 2101–2110, 1606, and 2111.October 21, 199816 U.S.C. 2101
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Department of the Interior and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 1999, and also as part of the Omnibus Consolidated and Emergency Supplemental Appropriations Act, 1999, and not as part of the Cooperative Forestry Assistance Act of 1978 which comprises this chapter.
